goal: Generate real ElevenLabs voice corpus. scripts/conduit_tui/dataset_gen.py iterates 5 premade voices (Sarah, Roger, Laura, Charlie, George) x 30 conversational phrases through ElevenLabs convert_with_timestamps (eleven_flash_v2_5, mp3_44100_128 — free-tier compatible), decodes mp3 to int16 PCM via miniaudio, and writes wav files at data/dataset/voices/<voice_id>/<index>.wav plus a manifest.json. Idempotent — skips existing non-empty wavs on re-run. Generated 150 clips (33.2 MB, ~395s total audio) in 41s with 0 errors. data/dataset/ added to .gitignore (billable artifacts).
